raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes whether the method, aggregation choice, and evaluation claims form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The passage makes performance claims about known actives and target-level patterns, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evaluation is central.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level issues because the artifact is a rough prose draft with long, congested sentences.","RX.1":"The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify which kind of checking is intended.","RX.2":"The checker should avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported benchmark and top-50 results support.","RX.3":"The task is only to check the provided passage, not to execute edits or expand the research.","RX.4":"The passage concerns ligand prioritization, so checking should avoid encouraging misleading biomedical or downstream decision claims.","RX.5":"Any projected checking responsibility should remain traceable to the exact claims and wording present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes whether the method, aggregation choice, and evaluation claims form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes performance claims about known actives and target-level patterns, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evaluation is central.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level issues because the artifact is a rough prose draft with long, congested sentences.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify which kind of checking is intended.
rationale.RX.2: The checker should avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported benchmark and top-50 results support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to check the provided passage, not to execute edits or expand the research.
rationale.RX.4: The passage concerns ligand prioritization, so checking should avoid encouraging misleading biomedical or downstream decision claims.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected checking responsibility should remain traceable to the exact claims and wording present in the artifact.
